title: BEM-868 script append next
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
line = 'Next: continue roadmap from AGENT_CONTEXT.md'
if line not in text:
    ctx.write_text(text.rstrip() + '\n' + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM868_SCRIPT_APPEND_NEXT_LINE.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-868 script append next line\nStatus: APPENDED_OR_ALREADY_PRESENT\nLine: ' + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(ctx))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM868 script appended exact Next line')
"""
